LanguageData.SD_Hediff_EternalBond.label: Eternal bond
LanguageData.SD_Hediff_EternalBond.description: The Stellar subunit has fully awakened and chosen to form an eternal emotional connection with her guide. Her eyes are fixed on you alone.
LanguageData.SD_Hediff_EternalBond.stages.0.label: Eternal bond
LanguageData.SD_Hediff_DarkAwakening.label: Dark awakening
LanguageData.SD_Hediff_DarkAwakening.description: The Stellar subunit's awakening has turned toward darkness. Her consciousness is twisted and filled with hostility toward everything.
LanguageData.SD_Hediff_DarkAwakening.stages.0.label: Dark awakening
LanguageData.SD_Hediff_WitchForm.label: Stellar - abyssal form
LanguageData.SD_Hediff_WitchForm.description: Stellar fractals flow through this body, greatly enhancing its capabilities and providing powerful protection. An invisible barrier covers the body and resists incoming damage.\n\n<color=#00FFFF>“I have returned through the pale gate and risen beyond all things. My strength can command others; my power can command myself. My limbs are strong, and shall move and shape all things. My body is perfected, made whole, and shall remain whole forever.”</color>
LanguageData.SD_Hediff_NormalForm.label: Stellar - starward form
LanguageData.SD_Hediff_NormalForm.description: Stellar fractals flow through this body, greatly enhancing its capabilities and providing powerful protection. An invisible barrier covers the body and resists incoming damage.\n\n<color=#00FFFF>“I have returned through the pale gate and risen beyond all things. My strength can command others; my power can command myself. My limbs are strong, and shall move and shape all things. My body is perfected, made whole, and shall remain whole forever.”</color>
LanguageData.SD_Retardant.label: Stellar - phase retardation
LanguageData.SD_RailgunDebuff.label: Stellar - phase overload
